tasks.subject: Task 0: Module skeleton + errors
tasks.description:
**Goal:** Empty package with all error classes defined; gives downstream tasks an import target without circular wait.

**Files:**
- Create: `src/kinoforge/core/grid/__init__.py`
- Create: `src/kinoforge/core/grid/errors.py`
- Create: `tests/core/test_grid_errors.py`

**Acceptance Criteria:**
- [ ] `from kinoforge.core.grid.errors import GridSpecUnderRepoError, GridCellPathMissing, GridCellFailure, GridBudgetExceeded, FfmpegInvocationError, FfmpegNotFoundError, DottedPathError` succeeds
- [ ] Every error class subclasses `KinoforgeError`
- [ ] `GridCellFailure(idx, cfg_repr, exception_chain)` stores all three attrs

**Verify:** `pixi run -- pytest tests/core/test_grid_errors.py -v`

```json:metadata
{"files": ["src/kinoforge/core/grid/__init__.py", "src/kinoforge/core/grid/errors.py", "tests/core/test_grid_errors.py"], "verifyCommand": "pixi run -- pytest tests/core/test_grid_errors.py -v", "acceptanceCriteria": ["import all 7 error classes", "all subclass KinoforgeError", "GridCellFailure stores idx + cfg_repr + exception_chain"], "modelTier": "mechanical"}
```

tasks.subject: Task 1: _escape_drawtext helper
tasks.description:
**Goal:** ffmpeg drawtext filter mis-parses silently on un-escaped `:`, `'`, `\`, `%`. Helper percent-encodes these so captions survive intact.

**Files:**
- Create: `src/kinoforge/core/grid/compose.py` (initial)
- Create: `tests/core/test_grid_compose.py` (initial)

**Acceptance Criteria:**
- [ ] `_escape_drawtext("a:b'c%d\\e")` returns `"a\\:b\\'c\\%d\\\\e"`
- [ ] Empty string → empty string
- [ ] Unicode passthrough
- [ ] Newlines escaped as `\n`

**Verify:** `pixi run -- pytest tests/core/test_grid_compose.py::test_escape_drawtext -v`

```json:metadata
{"files": ["src/kinoforge/core/grid/compose.py", "tests/core/test_grid_compose.py"], "verifyCommand": "pixi run -- pytest tests/core/test_grid_compose.py::test_escape_drawtext -v", "acceptanceCriteria": ["4 special chars escaped", "empty string + unicode + newlines handled", "backslash processed first to avoid double-escape"], "modelTier": "mechanical"}
```

tasks.subject: Task 2: Dotted-path resolver
tasks.description:
**Goal:** `set_path(obj, path_str, value)` walks `.field` / `[N]` access patterns on pydantic models, mutates target location, then triggers full re-validation. Wildcards explicitly rejected.

**Files:**
- Create: `src/kinoforge/core/grid/dotted_path.py`
- Create: `tests/core/test_grid_dotted_path.py`

**Acceptance Criteria:**
- [ ] `set_path(cfg, 'loras[0].strength', 0.5)` mutates exactly that location
- [ ] Index out of range → DottedPathError
- [ ] Unknown field → DottedPathError
- [ ] `[*]` wildcard rejected
- [ ] Post-mutation pydantic re-validation runs
- [ ] Empty path raises

**Verify:** `pixi run -- pytest tests/core/test_grid_dotted_path.py -v`

```json:metadata
{"files": ["src/kinoforge/core/grid/dotted_path.py", "tests/core/test_grid_dotted_path.py"], "verifyCommand": "pixi run -- pytest tests/core/test_grid_dotted_path.py -v", "acceptanceCriteria": ["list/dict walker with [N] indexing", "unknown field + out-of-range + wildcard all raise DottedPathError", "post-mutation re-validation via model_validate"], "modelTier": "standard"}
```

tasks.subject: Task 3: GridSpec pydantic models
tasks.description:
**Goal:** Pure schema — cells, captions, layout, budget. No loader, no path guard yet.

**Files:**
- Create: `src/kinoforge/core/grid/spec.py` (models only)
- Create: `tests/core/test_grid_spec.py`

**Acceptance Criteria:**
- [ ] Minimal valid spec parses
- [ ] Both-variant cell rejected
- [ ] Neither-variant cell rejected
- [ ] List/dict override values rejected
- [ ] Missing budget_cap_usd rejected
- [ ] extra='forbid' blocks unknown keys
- [ ] Layout 'RxC' or 'auto' accepted; junk rejected

**Verify:** `pixi run -- pytest tests/core/test_grid_spec.py -v -k 'not load'`

```json:metadata
{"files": ["src/kinoforge/core/grid/spec.py", "tests/core/test_grid_spec.py"], "verifyCommand": "pixi run -- pytest tests/core/test_grid_spec.py -v -k 'not load'", "acceptanceCriteria": ["GenerateCell + PathCell discriminated union", "override values scalar-only", "budget_cap_usd required (no default)", "layout regex validation"], "modelTier": "standard"}
```

tasks.subject: Task 4: GridSpec loader + path guard + redaction
tasks.description:
**Goal:** `GridSpec.load(path)` mirrors `Vault.load`: outside-repo guard, YAML parse, register captions+title with RedactionRegistry.

**Files:**
- Modify: `src/kinoforge/core/grid/spec.py` (add `load` classmethod)
- Modify: `src/kinoforge/core/grid/errors.py` (add GridSpecPathError, GridSpecParseError)
- Modify: `tests/core/test_grid_spec.py`

**Acceptance Criteria:**
- [ ] Outside-repo spec loads successfully
- [ ] Under-repo spec raises GridSpecUnderRepoError
- [ ] Missing file raises GridSpecPathError
- [ ] Malformed YAML raises GridSpecParseError
- [ ] Title + every caption registered with RedactionRegistry on success
- [ ] Idempotent register (no raise on duplicate load)

**Verify:** `pixi run -- pytest tests/core/test_grid_spec.py -v`

```json:metadata
{"files": ["src/kinoforge/core/grid/spec.py", "src/kinoforge/core/grid/errors.py", "tests/core/test_grid_spec.py"], "verifyCommand": "pixi run -- pytest tests/core/test_grid_spec.py -v", "acceptanceCriteria": ["mirrors Vault.load shape exactly", "RedactionRegistry.add for title + captions", "4 error paths covered"], "modelTier": "standard"}
```

tasks.subject: Task 5: capability_key cell grouping
tasks.description:
**Goal:** Walk resolved cells, group by `CapabilityKey.derive()`. path: cells form one degenerate `_PATH_GROUP_KEY` group.

**Files:**
- Create: `src/kinoforge/core/grid/grouping.py`
- Create: `tests/core/test_grid_grouping.py`

**Acceptance Criteria:**
- [ ] Strength sweep (same base, only strength varies) → 1 group
- [ ] Different config per cell → N groups
- [ ] Mixed generate + path → 2+ groups (one degenerate path group)
- [ ] Insertion-order preserved
- [ ] Empty input returns {}

**Verify:** `pixi run -- pytest tests/core/test_grid_grouping.py -v`

```json:metadata
{"files": ["src/kinoforge/core/grid/grouping.py", "tests/core/test_grid_grouping.py"], "verifyCommand": "pixi run -- pytest tests/core/test_grid_grouping.py -v", "acceptanceCriteria": ["structural-subtype protocol on cells", "_PATH_GROUP_KEY sentinel for no-compute cells", "insertion-order preserved"], "modelTier": "mechanical"}
```

tasks.subject: Task 6: Layout resolver + filter-graph builder
tasks.description:
**Goal:** Pure-Python helpers that build the ffmpeg arg list. No subprocess yet.

**Files:**
- Modify: `src/kinoforge/core/grid/compose.py`
- Modify: `tests/core/test_grid_compose.py`

**Acceptance Criteria:**
- [ ] `_resolve_layout('auto', n=3)` returns (2,2); n=4 → (2,2); n=6 → (3,2)
- [ ] Explicit 'RxC' returns (R,C); R*C < N raises ValueError
- [ ] `_build_filter_graph` produces scale+pad+fps+tpad chain per input + xstack
- [ ] Caption escaping invoked via `_escape_drawtext`
- [ ] Empty cells → ValueError

**Verify:** `pixi run -- pytest tests/core/test_grid_compose.py -v`

```json:metadata
{"files": ["src/kinoforge/core/grid/compose.py", "tests/core/test_grid_compose.py"], "verifyCommand": "pixi run -- pytest tests/core/test_grid_compose.py -v", "acceptanceCriteria": ["auto-layout via sqrt+ceil", "explicit RxC validation", "per-cell normalize chain (scale/pad/fps/tpad)", "xstack row-major positions"], "modelTier": "standard"}
```

tasks.subject: Task 7: ffmpeg composer subprocess invocation
tasks.description:
**Goal:** `_check_ffmpeg()` + `probe_inputs()` + `compose_grid_mp4()` — actual subprocess shell-out, stderr capture on failure.

**Files:**
- Modify: `src/kinoforge/core/grid/compose.py`
- Modify: `tests/core/test_grid_compose.py`

**Acceptance Criteria:**
- [ ] `_check_ffmpeg()` raises FfmpegNotFoundError if binary missing
- [ ] `probe_inputs([path])` returns list[InputProbe] via ffprobe JSON
- [ ] `compose_grid_mp4` invokes ffmpeg with libx264 + -an + -y
- [ ] Non-zero exit → FfmpegInvocationError + stderr → <out>.stderr.txt

**Verify:** `pixi run -- pytest tests/core/test_grid_compose.py -v`

```json:metadata
{"files": ["src/kinoforge/core/grid/compose.py", "tests/core/test_grid_compose.py"], "verifyCommand": "pixi run -- pytest tests/core/test_grid_compose.py -v", "acceptanceCriteria": ["subprocess.run arg-list (no shell=True)", "ffprobe JSON parsed for width/height/fps/duration", "stderr file written on failure"], "modelTier": "standard"}
```

tasks.subject: Task 8: Grid executor — subprocess per cell, group-parallel
tasks.description:
**Goal:** `run_grid(spec, *, output_dir, max_parallel_groups) -> GridResult` orchestrates resolution + grouping + per-cell subprocess + composition.

**Files:**
- Create: `src/kinoforge/core/grid/executor.py`
- Create: `tests/core/test_grid_executor.py`

**Acceptance Criteria:**
- [ ] Status mapping: full | partial | budget | ffmpeg | teardown
- [ ] Per-cell subprocess cmd has --run-id <grid_id>__cell<idx>; --no-reuse only on last cell of group
- [ ] Cell failure aborts rest of group (pod state unknown); other groups continue
- [ ] Partial status → cell mp4s preserved in _grid_<id>_partial/ with caption-slug names
- [ ] Post-condition `kinoforge list` probe sets status='teardown' on residual pod
- [ ] asyncio.Semaphore caps concurrent groups

**Verify:** `pixi run -- pytest tests/core/test_grid_executor.py -v`

```json:metadata
{"files": ["src/kinoforge/core/grid/executor.py", "tests/core/test_grid_executor.py"], "verifyCommand": "pixi run -- pytest tests/core/test_grid_executor.py -v", "acceptanceCriteria": ["asyncio + Semaphore for group-parallel", "warm-reuse via --no-reuse-on-last-cell pattern", "post-condition list probe extends destroy-on-teardown protection", "GridCellResult.status: success|failed|aborted"], "modelTier": "standard"}
```

tasks.subject: Task 9: _cmd_grid CLI + subparser
tasks.description:
**Goal:** Wire `kinoforge grid` verb. 5 flags. Map GridResult.status → exit codes 0-5.

**Files:**
- Modify: `src/kinoforge/cli/_commands.py`
- Modify: `src/kinoforge/cli/_main.py`
- Create: `tests/cli/test_cmd_grid.py`

**Acceptance Criteria:**
- [ ] --help prints all 5 flags
- [ ] Missing --spec exits 1
- [ ] Status mapping: full=0, partial=2, budget=3, ffmpeg=4, teardown=5, spec error=1
- [ ] --dry-run skips compute, exits 0
- [ ] Spec validation error → exit 1 with underlying message

**Verify:** `pixi run -- pytest tests/cli/test_cmd_grid.py -v && pixi run kinoforge grid --help`

```json:metadata
{"files": ["src/kinoforge/cli/_commands.py", "src/kinoforge/cli/_main.py", "tests/cli/test_cmd_grid.py"], "verifyCommand": "pixi run -- pytest tests/cli/test_cmd_grid.py -v && pixi run kinoforge grid --help", "acceptanceCriteria": ["5 flags wired", "exit code mapping per spec", "dry-run path tested"], "modelTier": "mechanical"}
```

tasks.subject: Task 10: Integration test — 3 path: cells → real grid mp4
tasks.description:
**Goal:** End-to-end with REAL ffmpeg (no subprocess mocking) but no compute. Synthesizes 3 testsrc mp4s, runs full run_grid on path:-only spec, decodes output and verifies cell regions.

**Files:**

**Acceptance Criteria:**
- [ ] 3 testsrc mp4s generated via ffmpeg lavfi color=red/green/blue
- [ ] run_grid status=full, composed mp4 exists
- [ ] Middle frame decoded; cell regions show expected colors (±20 RGB tolerance)

**Verify:** `pixi run -- pytest tests/integration/test_grid_end_to_end.py -v`

```json:metadata
{"files": ["tests/integration/test_grid_end_to_end.py"], "verifyCommand": "pixi run -- pytest tests/integration/test_grid_end_to_end.py -v", "acceptanceCriteria": ["ffmpeg testsrc inputs", "real ffmpeg composition", "color-region pixel sample per cell"], "modelTier": "standard"}
```

tasks.subject: Task 16: USER-GATE — LIVE FIRE Tier-3 Wan 2.1 1.3B strength smoke
tasks.description:
**Goal:** Real RunPod fire. Wan 2.1 1.3B canonical Pokemon+static-rotation LoRA pair at strength={0.5, 1.0, 1.5}. Budget cap $0.30. Operator-loop perceptual eval.

**USER-ORDERED GATE — NON-SKIPPABLE.** This task was requested by the user in the current conversation. It MUST NOT be closed by walking around it, by declaring it "verified inline", or by substituting a cheaper check. Close only after every item in `acceptanceCriteria` has been re-validated independently, with output captured.

**Files:**
- Modify: `tests/smoke/live_wan21/test_lora_strength_variation.py` (add live body)

**Acceptance Criteria:**
- [ ] `pixi run preflight` exit 0 before fire
- [ ] Test exit 0 under KINOFORGE_LIVE_TESTS=1 KINOFORGE_LIVE_FIRE=1
- [ ] Composed grid mp4 lands in output/
- [ ] 3 per-cell mp4s pairwise-distinct sha256
- [ ] kinoforge list after = no running instances AND no ledger entries
- [ ] Spend under $0.30 via kinoforge cost
- [ ] Operator perceptual eval: strength variation visible

**Verify:** `pixi run preflight && KINOFORGE_LIVE_TESTS=1 KINOFORGE_LIVE_FIRE=1 pixi run -- pytest tests/smoke/live_wan21/test_lora_strength_variation.py::test_lora_strength_variation_wan21_live -v -s 2>&1 | tee /tmp/p1-tier3-fire.log`

```json:metadata
{"files": ["tests/smoke/live_wan21/test_lora_strength_variation.py"], "verifyCommand": "pixi run preflight && KINOFORGE_LIVE_TESTS=1 KINOFORGE_LIVE_FIRE=1 pixi run -- pytest tests/smoke/live_wan21/test_lora_strength_variation.py::test_lora_strength_variation_wan21_live -v -s 2>&1 | tee /tmp/p1-tier3-fire.log", "acceptanceCriteria": ["preflight exit 0 before fire", "test exit 0", "composed grid mp4 exists in output/", "3 per-cell mp4s with pairwise-distinct sha256", "kinoforge list after test = no running instances AND no ledger entries", "spend under $0.30 via kinoforge cost", "operator perceptual eval: strength variation visible on grid mp4"], "userGate": true, "tags": ["user-gate", "live-spend", "tier-3"], "gateScope": "Tier-3 strength-variation smoke against real RunPod", "failurePolicy": "abort on cell failure; preserve partial mp4s; destroy pod before exit", "modelTier": "standard"}
```
